canvas.wrapHint: Visible front · content wraps around the sides

editorError.templateNotFoundBody: We couldn't find a template for this product. Please contact support if the problem persists.

cart.title: Cart
cart.readyHint: Happy with it? Add to cart

format.noActiveSizes: This product has no active sizes configured yet.

map.tipDrag: Tip: drag and zoom directly in the map to fine-tune.
map.showLabels: Show area names on the map

text.autoHint: Leave empty to return to automatic text

layer.tipMove: Tip: drag the ✥ handle on the layer in the preview to move it.

photo.tipCrop: Drag the image to choose the crop. Scroll to zoom — pinch on mobile.
photo.errorTooLargeHint: Max 25 MB. Compress and try again.
photo.errorTooSmall: Image too small for print ({{w}}×{{h}}). At least {{min}} px on the shortest side required.
photo.errorWrongType: The image must be JPEG, PNG or WebP.

ai.uploadFirst: Upload an image first to be able to pick an AI style.

aiPhoto.missingReference: Missing reference image for this subject
aiPhoto.notConfigured: This product is not fully configured yet. Please contact support.
aiPhoto.friendlyFailed: We couldn't create the image. Try another photo with a clear face and good lighting.
aiPhoto.styleHintBackgroundOnly: The background is always removed — the style only affects the subject.
aiPhoto.subjectHintHuman: The image should show the face straight on, well lit.
aiPhoto.subjectHintPet: The image should clearly show the animal's face, preferably from the front.
aiPhoto.subjectHintRemoveBg: Upload an image where the subject is clearly visible — we'll remove the background for you.

cartAdd.variantUnavailable: This combination is not yet available in the store
cartAdd.freeformEmpty: Add something to your design first
cartAdd.freeformEmptyHint: Add at least one image, map or text before checking out.

adminDelete.title: Delete template permanently?
adminDelete.warning: This deletes the template in Lovable and removes the product from Shopify. This cannot be undone.
adminDelete.successWithErrors: Template deleted, but Shopify deletion had errors

mapIcons.heading: Icons
mapIcons.addToMap: Click to place on the map

multiFace.allRequired: Upload one portrait for each face to continue.

layers.intro: Add layers to build your design freely — image, map, text and decoration.
layers.empty: No layers yet. Tap "Add layer" to start.

onboarding.title: How Create your own works
onboarding.body: Add images, a map, text and decor. Drag to reorder, tap the eye to hide, and the trash icon to remove.
onboarding.step1Body: Tap "Add layer" and pick a type: photo, map, text, shape or line.
onboarding.step2Body: Use the blue dot at the top-left of each layer to drag it where you want.
onboarding.step3Body: Use the handle in the bottom-right corner to scale the layer. You can hide all handles with the toggle above.
onboarding.step4Body: Drag in the list to reorder. The eye hides a layer, the trash removes it.

handlesToggle.label: Show move and resize handles
handlesToggle.hint: Turn off for a clean preview without handles on the layers.

onboarding.bild: Upload a photo to get started.

forvandling.faceSingle: Upload a photo where the face is clearly visible, facing the camera.
forvandling.multiFace: Upload one portrait per face – each slot is separate. Clear, front-facing faces give the best result.
forvandling.aiPhoto: Upload a photo and pick a style – then press Create.

onboarding.karta: Search an address or move the map to the right spot.
onboarding.stil: Pick a layout design – they change both composition and look.
onboarding.text: Tap the text field to edit. Leave empty to hide a line.
onboarding.format: Choose size and frame, if any.

productOptions.title: Product & variants
productOptions.subtitle: Choose which products, sizes and variants this template is sold as.
productOptions.missingSku_one: {{count}} variant combination lacks a Gelato SKU and will be skipped when syncing to Shopify (e.g. {{example}}).
productOptions.missingSku_other: {{count}} variant combinations lack a Gelato SKU and will be skipped when syncing to Shopify (e.g. {{example}}).

mapStyles.title: Map styles
mapStyles.subtitle: {{count}} of {{total}} enabled. Styles the customer can pick for the map layer.

fonts.title: Allowed fonts
fonts.subtitle: {{count}} of {{total}} enabled. Fonts the customer can pick for text layers.

designer.syncAuthDescription: The backend's Shopify Admin token was rejected. Reconnect the Shopify integration in Lovable and try again.
designer.notPublishedToStore: NOTE: not published in Online Store
designer.productNotFound: No product found with this handle
designer.legacyConfigDescription: Save to lock it into the database.
designer.minOneOrientation: At least one orientation must be active
designer.priceOverrideDescription: Change individual variant prices for just this template. Global default prices are set in the Prices tab.
designer.freeformDescription: When enabled, the customer gets a "Layers" tab and can add image, AI image, map, text, shape, line and margin themselves. The template's own layers act as the starting point.
designer.canvasSubtitle: Drag & drop · 5% snap · alignment guides while dragging.
designer.setsDefaultBackground: Sets the customer's default background for {{orientation}}.
designer.canvasDesignHint: Canvas design · designing against the visible front · wrap (approx {{depth}} cm) is extended automatically at print
designer.emptyDescription: Create a default layout (map + text) or add layers manually above.
designer.makeDefaultConfirm: Set as default? The current Standard layout is moved to a style.
designer.stylesDescription: Multiple layouts for the same template — the customer can switch in the editor. The design area below edits the selected style.
designer.thumbnailDialogDescription: Upload an image, paste a URL, or let the system generate a snapshot of the style.

layerInspector.selectLayerPrompt: Select a layer to edit its settings.
layerInspector.name: Name
layerInspector.placeholderHint: Shown in the admin canvas and customer editor before a photo is uploaded.
layerInspector.marginHint: Symmetric margin around the whole motif. The thickness is the same on all sides regardless of orientation. The customer cannot change this.
layerInspector.lineHint: Position and length are controlled via X/Y/Width/Height above. The customer cannot change the line.
layerInspector.shapeHint: Admin-only decoration. Position and size are controlled via X/Y/Width/Height above. The customer cannot change the shape.
layerInspector.locksHint: Unlocked properties can be changed by the customer in the editor.
layerInspector.motifQuestion: What is the customer's photo of?
layerInspector.motifPlaceholder: e.g. a pet, a person, a residential house
layerInspector.motifHint: Tells the AI what to keep when it removes the background. Without it a whole-scene photo keeps its surroundings.
layerInspector.uploadReferenceFailed: Could not upload the reference image
layerInspector.referenceHint: The costume / scene the customer's photo is placed onto. Add as many as you like — the customer picks which one to use.
layerInspector.legacySizeWarning: Using legacy size (% of height: {{pct}}%). Set a pt size to upgrade.
layerInspector.linkedRowsHintPre: Order determines display order. For fine control: type
layerInspector.linkedRowsHintPost: in the content — the renderer then follows your own layout (same row or its own row).
layerInspector.spanHintPre: Select text in the content above, click
layerInspector.spanHintPost: and set font/size/color only for that area.
layerInspector.selectTextFirst: Select a part of the text first
layerInspector.mapStylesHint: {{count}} of {{total}} enabled. Toggle which map styles the customer can pick, and drag the order with the arrows.

configs.installWindowDescription: Approve the app in the Shopify tab — the page updates automatically on return.
configs.pageSubtitle: Layouts, map styles, sizes and Gelato mapping
configs.syncDisabledUntilInstalled: — syncing is disabled until the app is installed.
configs.emptyState: No templates yet. Click "Create new template" to get started.
configs.confirmSyncDescription_one: {{count}} template will be sent to Shopify. Existing products with the same handle are updated (title, variants, metafields). Do you want to continue?
configs.confirmSyncDescription_other: {{count}} templates will be sent to Shopify. Existing products with the same handle are updated (title, variants, metafields). Do you want to continue?

createTemplate.selectAtLeastOne: Select at least one product type
createTemplate.reconnectShopify: Reconnect the Shopify integration in Lovable and run Sync again.
createTemplate.createdAndSynced: Template created and synced to Shopify
createTemplate.dialogDescription: An empty template is created. You can add layers and variants right afterwards.
createTemplate.productTypesHint: A Shopify product is created where the product types become variants (Product type/Size/Finish).

publishing.title: Shopify publishing
publishing.subtitle: Status, tags, category, description & SEO. Changes are sent on the next sync.
publishing.autoTagsHint: Auto-tags (template slug, product type, "personalized", "print-on-demand") are always added.

settings.title: Price settings
settings.introPrefix: Global default prices per material and variant, in
settings.introSuffix: (the store's currency — cannot be changed). Empty fields = not offered.
settings.noPricesToSaveDescription: Fill in at least one price.
settings.filledCountNote: {{count}} price(s) filled in total. Prices left empty are skipped during sync (the variant is not created in Shopify until a price is set).

pricing.noMaterials: Enable at least one product type (with sizes) above to be able to override prices.
pricing.footerNote: Empty fields use the global default price (from the Prices tab). Filled-in values apply only to this template. Saved with the template; sync updates the Shopify price.

layerList.empty: No layers yet. Add a map or text via the tool buttons.

aiLibrary.title: AI recipes
aiLibrary.intro: A recipe defines what the AI does to a customer's photo — a face swap, a pet portrait, a style. Write it once and reuse it across templates. Start from a template below, or build your own.
aiLibrary.emptyState: No recipes yet. Clone a starter below, or build one from scratch.
aiLibrary.whichModels: Which models can a recipe use?
aiLibrary.deleteWarning: Templates that still point at this recipe will stop generating until you pick another one. This can't be undone.

recipeEditor.choicesHint: Choices — the label is shown, the text is sent to the model
recipeEditor.dialogDescription: A recipe is what the AI does to a customer's photo. Test it here before you use it in a template.
recipeEditor.name: Name
recipeEditor.namePlaceholder: Pet portrait in a royal scene
recipeEditor.promptPlaceholder: Describe the edit. Refer to the reference as image #1 and the customer's photo as image #2.
recipeEditor.wrapInBraces: Wrap a word in braces to make it a slot the customer fills, e.g.
recipeEditor.modelNoPrompt: {{label}} doesn't take a prompt — it always does the same thing.
recipeEditor.customerChoicesHint: Each slot in your prompt becomes a picker in the storefront.
recipeEditor.thenCutsOut: first, then cuts the subject out to a transparent PNG so your template's background shows through.
recipeEditor.styleSubjectPrefix: Want to style the subject too? Pick
recipeEditor.styleSubjectSuffix: and tick "Remove the background afterwards". Styling after a cutout would paint the background back in.
recipeEditor.descriptionPlaceholder: Shown to you in the library — not to customers.
recipeEditor.extraStepsNote: This recipe chains extra steps beyond the background-removal finish. They aren't editable here — they are preserved when you save.
recipeEditor.testHint: Runs the real model, exactly as a customer would.
recipeEditor.uploadCustomerPhoto: Upload a customer photo to test.
